heroHeadline: Iran Proposes 'Workable' 10-Point Peace Plan as US Ceasefire Opens Diplomatic Window
heroSubtitle: Iran submits a structured 10-point peace proposal as the two-week US ceasefire framework creates space for negotiations. Netanyahu clarifies Lebanon is excluded; world leaders urge lasting peace.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-08. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC.
